channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: colbymchenry /codegraph | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local

item.title: ruvnet /RuView | Rust | N/A
item.description: π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

item.title: tinyhumansai /openhuman | Rust | N/A
item.description: Your Personal AI super intelligence. Private, Simple and extremely powerful.

item.title: supertone-inc /supertonic | Swift | N/A
item.description: Lightning-Fast, On-Device, Multilingual TTS — running natively via ONNX.

item.title: Anil-matcha /Open-Generative-AI | JavaScript | N/A
item.description: Open-source alternative to AI video platforms — Free AI image & video generation studio with 200+ models (Flux, Midjourney, Kling, Sora, Veo). No content filters. Self-hosted, MIT licensed.

item.title: obra /superpowers | Shell | N/A
item.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

item.title: K-Dense-AI /scientific-agent-skills | Python | N/A
item.description: A set of ready to use Agent Skills for research, science, engineering, analysis, finance and writing.

item.title: oven-sh /bun | Rust | N/A
item.description: Incredibly fast JavaScript runtime, bundler, test runner, and package manager – all in one
